subcodes.first_line: O Essence of Ancient Beauty! From the Most Great Horizon I gaze upon thee and declare: The heart hath ever been the dawning-place of the effulgent rays of My Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گوهر جمال قدم از منظر اکبر بتو ناظر و میفرماید قلب محل تجلی انوار وجهم بوده و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
